name: Cash+ Secured Visa Card
effective_cost: Free, with no annual fee, but requiring a refundable $300–$5,000 security deposit to set your limit

verdict.text: Same flexible 5%/2% categories, good for rebuilding credit

earn_rates.category: Two categories you choose each quarter, first $2,000 combined, then 1%
Prepaid air, hotel & car, Travel Center only
One everyday category you choose: gas/EV, groceries, or dining

earn_note: Identical category structure to the unsecured Cash+: categories must be actively enrolled each quarter or everything defaults to 1%. Discount stores/supercenters and wholesale clubs are excluded from grocery- and gas-category bonus rates.

redemption_options.method: Deposit to a U.S. Bank checking or savings account
Statement credit, rewards card, or merchant gift cards

points.note: Same redemption menu and category math as the unsecured Cash+: max out both 5% categories every quarter for the best blended rate.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer currency: straight cash back, not a points program.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for unauthorized transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: No purchase-protection or extended-warranty guide published specifically for this card.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card.

services.name: Refundable security deposit
services.detail: $300–$5,000, held in a secured savings account, sets your credit limit dollar-for-dollar.

services.name: Automatic graduation path
services.detail: U.S. Bank monitors your account and may automatically graduate you to the unsecured Cash+ Visa Signature Card, returning your deposit.

services.name: Choose your due date
services.detail: Pick a payment due date that fits your schedule.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns cash back on their spend (into your account)
Their activity is reported to the credit bureaus too, on the same account

additional_cards.note: Free to add. Since this account reports to all three bureaus, an authorized user benefits from the payment history alongside the primary cardholder.
